jd_analysis_result.summary: The Personal Care Worker role at Calvary Ryde Retirement Community involves providing resident-centred care within the aged care team. This hands-on position allows for a positive impact on the lives of residents while working in a supportive and inclusive environment.

skill_evidence.whs: Working knowledge of WHS and Infection Control
skill_evidence.aged care: Calvary Ryde Retirement Community is a purpose-built residence providing leading aged care services
skill_evidence.infection control: Working knowledge of WHS and Infection Control
skill_evidence.certificate iii aged care: Certificate III Aged Care or Individual Support is essential
skill_evidence.effective interpersonal communication: Effective interpersonal communication; both written and verbal

responsibilities: promote the delivery of quality care to residents and their families
demonstrating competence in the provision of resident-centred care
